pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; without this change, the compiler would target JDK 11, failing to utilize or comply with JDK 17 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if JDK 17-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 2.7.5 to ensure compatibility with JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.6.x has limited or no support for JDK 17; upgrading to 2.7.x is required to run on JDK 17 without runtime errors or missing features.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin Java 11 to Java 17 Alpine to align with the target JDK version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to Java 17; running Java 17 bytecode on a Java 11 JRE results in runtime errors (UnsupportedClassVersionError).

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update user creation commands to use Alpine Linux compatible syntax (-S flag) instead of Debian/Ubuntu specific flags (--system).
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The base image changed to Alpine, which uses BusyBox utilities that do not support the --system flag for adduser/addgroup.
